testcase.name: putMeterReadingnottheLatestreadingV4

failure.message: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"READ00000000905 is not the latest reading for the connection/equipment. Most recent meter reading READ00000000907 must be delete.","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. No adjustment can be made until bill is posted or deleted.","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"READ00000000905 is not the latest reading for the connection/equipment. Most recent meter reading READ00000000907 must be delete.","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. No adjustment can be made until bill is posted or deleted.","Level":3}]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at com.NexustAPIAutomation.java.CommonMethods.putMethod(CommonMethods.java:784) at
